conversation.text: Hey Tom, mark here from markeye. I just saw that you checked out the demo, so I wanted to reach out straight away. Was this regarding Vibe Clothing?
yep thats me
nice one, what made you want to check out the demo
just been seeing a lot about ai stuff lately and thought id look into it for the business
yeah fair enough, so what does Vibe Clothing do exactly, is it all online or have you got stores too
all online, we're a DTC brand selling streetwear
nice, and where are most of your customers finding you right now, ads, social, organic
mainly meta and tiktok ads, some organic from instagram
decent, roughly how many enquiries or leads we talking per month
hard to say exactly but our site gets a lot of traffic, probably a few hundred enquiries and abandoned carts a month

ok so a solid amount then
|||
and right now when someone drops off or sends an enquiry, what happens, is there someone following up or does it just sit there

honestly not much happens, we have a small team and they focus on fulfilment mostly
leads just kind of sit in the inbox

yeah that's really common with ecommerce brands actually
|||
you're spending on ads to get them to the site and then when they drop off or enquire nobody's catching them
yeah its something we know we need to sort
so out of interest, would you say the biggest problem is the speed of getting back to people, or is it more the follow up consistency, or just not having anyone catching those leads at all
probably all three if im honest, but mainly just nobody is there to catch them

yeah makes sense
|||
have you tried anything before for this or is this the first time you've looked into it
we tried manychat for a bit
yeah how did that go
it was ok for basic stuff but it sounded really generic, customers could tell straight away it wasnt a real person

yeah that's the main issue with those tools honestly, they work for simple flows but the tone is always off and customers notice
|||
what we build is different, it's built from scratch around your brand voice and your actual sales process so it sounds like your team not a template

yeah thats what id want ideally
but cant i just do that with chatgpt and save money

you could for basic stuff yeah
|||
where it falls short is it doesn't plug into your systems, doesn't qualify properly, and the tone drifts the longer the conversation goes
|||
we build something that stays consistent, integrates with your setup, and actually books people in rather than just answering questions

ok fair point
how much are we talking though

it's scope based so I can't give you an exact number here to be honest
|||
usually comes in under a month of ad spend though, often just a fraction of it, and it's mostly a build fee split 50/50 so it's not all upfront
hmm idk we're not a massive company, is it even worth it for our size

size isn't really the factor honestly, it's more about whether those missed leads are actually costing you
|||
if you've got hundreds of enquiries a month and most of them are just sitting there, that's revenue walking out the door that you've already paid for through ads

yeah true
but we do have a team, they just dont do the lead stuff

yeah and that's the thing, we don't replace your team
|||
the agent handles the first touch, catches the enquiry, qualifies them, and hands them over so your team only deals with people who are actually ready to buy
|||
saves them time and you stop losing the ones that slip through
ok that makes more sense actually

well I think the next best step would be to book in a discovery call with the founder Louis where he can walk you through all things price, ROI, strategy, and see if we're a good fit for you or not
|||
did you want me to send over a link now or did you have any other questions beforehand
what if it doesnt work for us though

genuinely, we don't build for everyone and Louis would say that straight on the call if it's not the right fit
|||
the call's just to figure that out, no pitch, no pressure, 20 minutes and you'll know either way
ok yeah fair enough, send it over
great, shall I send over the link then
yeah go on

https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
|||
just grab whatever time works
booked in for friday
I'll let Louis know now and ping him over some details. Speak soon
